posts.title: 2019 SAAS Private Survey Results- Part 1
posts.summary: For the seventh year in a row, we’re proud to work with KBCM Technology Group (formerly Pacific Crest Securities) to share results from a survey of ~424 private SaaS companies. Thank you to the readers of forEntrepreneurs who participated in … The post 2019 SAAS Private Survey Results- Part 1 appeared first on For Entrepreneurs .
